annotations.author: Dani (PO)
annotations.text: Usage feed shows zero traffic since it was wired and there are no declared consumers — proposing we retire this after the July finance close.

annotations.author: Sam (finance systems)
annotations.text: Confirmed: the nightly export moved to the warehouse pull in May. Nothing reads this anymore — fine to retire from our side.

annotations.author: Priya
annotations.text: The contract drift flagged here is the planned v2 capture payload (PAY-118) — expected. The schema mismatch on shipping:book is the real issue to chase.
